state_model.claim_boundary: This file preserves durable baselines, architecture authority, bounded grants, and promoted evidence. Live GitHub and Azure state must be queried at read time.

last_substantive_baseline.title: Fix collector demo API deployment name collision
last_substantive_baseline.claim_boundary: PR #59 remains a historical repository event. It does not describe the active API deployment strategy or prove Azure deployment.

latest_promoted_repository_event.title: Fix collector demo API deployment name collision
latest_promoted_repository_event.claim_boundary: The curated repository event log has not yet been extended through PR #66. This does not override the newer independent-workload architecture baseline recorded below.

architecture_baseline.claim_boundary: The independent workload is repository authority. Its Azure resources, service health, cost, and operational readiness remain unobserved until the read-only planner runs.

work_ownership_resolution.rule: Resolve default-branch head, open pull requests, branch ownership, and exact-head CI before every write.

repository_capabilities.claim_boundary: Collector-hosted assets remain historical repository capabilities. The active strategy is the independent subproject; fresh Azure evidence is required for planning, deployment, and operation.

bounded_authority_grants.authorization_source: Explicit user instruction for the separately bounded read-only publication planner
bounded_authority_grants.claim_boundary: This durable grant does not authorize independent demo API planning, deployment, cleanup, guest commands, or Azure mutation.

authority_defaults.rule: Authority is fail-closed unless a narrowly scoped current human instruction and workflow contract explicitly permit the operation.

collector_hosted_demo_api.claim_boundary: The collector-hosted path records valuable failure evidence but is not the active deployment strategy.

independent_demo_api.claim_boundary: False service-verification fields represent absence of verified success claims; Azure resource existence remains not observed rather than proven absent.

deployment_state.claim_boundary: Repository implementation is not deployment. Deployment is not service validation.

latest_promoted_evidence.freshness_boundary: Newer authenticated run 30053018998 was inspected in the handoff but is not yet promoted into deployment-history.jsonl. The independent workload has no Azure evidence yet.

configuration_state.claim_boundary: No independent demo endpoint may be committed before Azure deployment and service verification are established.

live_state_resolution.repository: Query live GitHub default branch and exact head.
live_state_resolution.pull_requests: Query open pull requests, write ownership, review state, and mergeability.
live_state_resolution.ci: Query workflow runs and jobs for the exact commit under evaluation.
live_state_resolution.azure: Use fresh scoped inventory, quota, policy, RBAC, ARM validation, What-If, deployment, guest, service, cost, and cleanup evidence.
live_state_resolution.local_working_tree: Not observable through the GitHub connector; inspect separately before local writes or merges.
